item.name: Bronze Challenger World Reward
item.desc:
Earn #c5,000# or more Challenger Points,
then click the #cClaim# button
to receive the
#cBronze rewards#.

item.name: Silver Challenger World Reward
item.desc:
Earn #c10,000# or more Challenger Points,
then click the #cClaim# button
to receive the
#cSilver rewards#.

item.name: Gold Challenger World Reward
item.desc:
Earn #c15,000# or more Challenger Points,
then click the #cClaim# button
to receive the
#cGold rewards#.

item.name: Emerald Challenger World Reward
item.desc:
Earn #c30,000# or more Challenger Points,
then click the #cClaim# button
to receive the
#cEmerald rewards#.

item.name: Diamond Challenger World Reward
item.desc:
Earn #c40,000# or more Challenger Points,
then click the #cClaim# button
to receive the
#cDiamond rewards#.

item.name: Challenger World Challenger Reward
item.desc:
Earn #c90,000# or more Challenger Points,
then click the #cClaim# button
to receive the
#cChallenger rewards#.

item.name: Platinum Challenger World Reward
item.desc:
Earn #c20,000# or more Challenger Points,
then click the #cClaim# button
to receive the
#cPlatinum rewards#.

item.name: Master Challenger World Reward
item.desc:
Earn #c65,000# or more Challenger Points,
then click the #cClaim# button
to receive the
#cMaster rewards#.

item.name: Lil Jay Pet Package
item.desc:
#cDouble-click# to get the following gifts:

#c- Lil Jay
- Lil Jay's Cat Mask

item.name: Kinesis Face/Hair Coupon Voucher
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to receive a #cKinesis Face Coupon# and a #cKinesis Hair Coupon#.#c\r\n\r\nItems obtained have a 7-day duration and can only be transferred between your characters in the same world.

item.name: Kinetic Chair
item.desc: A mysterious chair with the unmistakable trace of psychic energy.\r\n#cRestores 50 HP and 50 MP \r\nevery 10 seconds.#

item.name: Permanent Kinetic Mount Coupon
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to permanently obtain the #cKinetic Mount#.

item.name: Kinetic Damage Skin (Unit)
item.desc:
Applies the Kinetic Damage Skin (Unit)

#cOnce used, it will remain applied until you replace it with another damage skin.#

item.name: Knight Statue Coupon
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to obtain a #cKnight Statue# furnishing.\r\n\r\n#cThe furnishing is shared across worlds.#

item.name: Yunaroid Coupon
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to receive a #cYunaroid# and a#c Permanent Lidium Heart#.

item.name: Kinetic Label/Chat Ring Coupon
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to obtain #Kinetic Label Ring# and #cKinetic Chat Ring#.\r\n\r\nObtained items are permanent and cannot be traded.

item.name: Kinetic Effect Coupon
item.desc:
#cDouble-click# to obtain a #cKinetic
Effect#.

#cObtained items are permanent and cannot be traded.

item.name: Kinesis's Hideout Background Coupon
item.desc:
#cDouble-click# to obtain the
#cKinesis's Hideout Background#.

#cBackgrounds can be applied to
all your characters within the
same world.

item.name: Kinetic Medal Coupon
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to receive the #cKinetic# medal.\n\n#cThe medal obtained from the coupon cannot be traded.#

item.name: Sol Erda Fragment
item.desc: A faint magical fragment that was left over when Sol Erda was formed.\nIt's used in activating or enhancing #c6th Job powers#.

item.name: Sol Erda Fragment
item.desc: A faint magical fragment that was left over when Sol Erda was formed.\nIt's used in activating or enhancing #c6th Job powers#.

item.name: Challenger Partners Ring Coupon
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to obtain #cChallenger Partners Ring#.\n\n#cObtained item is permanent and cannot be traded.

item.name: Partneroid Coupon
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to receive an #cPartneroid# and a #cPermanent Lidium Heart.#

item.name: Soul Partner Medal Coupon
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to obtain the #cSoul Partner# Medal.\n\n#cThe item obtained is permanent and cannot be traded.

item.name: Mechaberry Farm Entry Pass
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to enter the #cMechaberry Farm# and gain a significant amount of EXP by defeating monsters.

item.name: Luxe Sauna Coupon
item.desc: #cDouble-click# to restore #c30 minutes# of #cLuxe Sauna usage#.

item.name: Sol Erda
item.desc: Sol Erda came into being when the Erdas of Maple World and Grandis combined. It has spread all over the world.\nIt's used in activating or enhancing #c6th Job powers#.
